Bash(/data/oih/miniconda/bin/python3 -c "
import json
from rdkit import Chem

with open\('data/linker_library.json'\) as f:
    lib = json.load\(f\)

print\(f'总计 {len\(lib[\\"linkers\\"]\)} 条 linker'\)
print\(\)
invalid = []
for l in lib['linkers']:
    mol = Chem.MolFromSmiles\(l['smiles']\)
    status = 'OK' if mol else 'INVALID'
    atoms = mol.GetNumAtoms\(\) if mol else 0
    if not mol:
        invalid.append\(l['id']\)
    print\(f'{status:8} {l[\\"id\\"]:30} atoms={atoms:3} | {l[\\"name\\"]}'\)

print\(\)
print\(f'INVALID: {invalid if invalid else \\"none\\"}'\)
")

import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '/data/oih/oih-api'\)
from tool_definitions.qwen_tools import TOOLS
pgb = [t for t in TOOLS if t.get\('function',{}\).get\('name'\) == 'pocket_guided_binder_pipeline']
print\(f'Found: {len\(pgb\)} tool\(s\)'\)
desc = pgb[0]['function']['description']
print\(f'Description length: {len\(desc\)} chars'\)
assert '14 steps' in desc, 'Missing 14 steps'
assert 'p2rank×0.2' in desc or 'p2rank' in desc.lower\(\), 'Missing scoring formula'
assert 'rag×0.3' in desc or 'rag' in desc.lower\(\), 'Missing RAG weight'
assert 'druggability reference' in desc, 'Missing DiffDock label'
print\('All assertions passed'\)
" 2>&1)

import httpx, json
with httpx.Client\(timeout=60, trust_env=False\) as c:
    r = c.post\('http://192.168.31.23:8002/v1/chat/completions', json={
        'model': 'Qwen3-14B',
        'messages': [{'role':'user','content':'Return JSON: {\\"test\\": 1}'}],
        'temperature': 0.1, 'max_tokens': 200
    }\)
    msg = r.json\(\)['choices'][0]['message']
    print\('keys:', list\(msg.keys\(\)\)\)
    print\('content repr:', repr\(msg.get\('content',''\)[:300] if msg.get\('content'\) else None\)\)
    print\('reasoning:', repr\(msg.get\('reasoning_content',''\)[:200] if msg.get\('reasoning_content'\) else None\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(NO_PROXY='*' no_proxy='*' /data/oih/miniconda/bin/python -c "
import httpx, json, asyncio
async def test\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=60, trust_env=False\) as c:
        r = await c.post\('http://192.168.31.23:8002/v1/chat/completions', json={
            'model': 'Qwen3-14B',
            'messages': [{'role':'user','content':'Return only JSON: {\\"selected_pocket_id\\": 1, \\"hotspot_residues\\": [\\"A42\\"], \\"selection_reason\\": \\"test\\"}'}],
            'temperature': 0.1, 'max_tokens': 200
        }\)
        print\(f'status={r.status_code}'\)
        msg = r.json\(\)['choices'][0]['message']
        print\('content:', repr\(msg.get\('content',''\)[:300]\)\)
asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import chromadb

for path in ['/data/oih/retrieval/chroma_db', '/data/oih/knowledge/chroma']:
    print\(f'=== {path} ==='\)
    client = chromadb.PersistentClient\(path=path\)
    cols = client.list_collections\(\)
    if not cols:
        print\('  \(empty\)'\)
    for c in cols:
        print\(f'  {c.name}: {c.count\(\)} docs'\)
")
